description_long: This is a single-story rectangular bungalow with a flat roof and a modern, minimalist design. The exterior features horizontal wooden siding in a natural brown color, complemented by white-framed windows and doors. The front facade includes a central wooden door flanked by three symmetrically placed windows, a small porch area with outdoor seating, and a paved walkway. The interior is visible through the open walls, revealing a spacious open-plan living area, kitchen, and dining space, as well as a bedroom and bathroom. The bungalow sits on a neatly trimmed green lawn, with paved areas for outdoor activities on the sides and rear. The overall appearance is clean, functional, and suited for suburban or urban residential neighborhoods.
description: A modern, single-story rectangular bungalow with brown wooden siding, white-framed windows, and a flat roof, set on a green lawn with paved outdoor areas.
description_view_0: Side view showing three white-framed windows, a paved patio with outdoor furniture, and a glimpse into the open-plan living and kitchen area.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the main entrance door, three symmetrically arranged windows, and the open interior layout with visible living and dining spaces.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with three windows, a paved area, and a clear look into the living room and bedroom spaces.
description_view_3: Front view featuring the main entrance door, a small porch with seating, three front-facing windows, and a paved walkway leading to the entrance.
